Jibo ES Expressions - esprima-compatible AST expression constructors
====================================================================

To use:

```js
const escodegen = require('escodegen');
const expressions = require('jibo-esexpressions');
const astNode = expressions.ConstFromNew('jiboLog', 'JiboLog', ['my-namespace']);
console.log(escodegen(astNode));
// const jiboLog = new JiboLog('my-namespace');
```
